# Security Policy

## Reporting Security Issues

If you discover a security vulnerability or have concerns regarding the security of this project, please follow these steps to report it to us:

1. **Do not** disclose the vulnerability publicly until it has been addressed by the project maintainers.
2. Submit a detailed report to our security team by sending an email to [security@example.com](mailto:security@example.com).
   - Include a clear description of the vulnerability or concern.
   - Provide steps to reproduce the issue, if possible.
   - Attach any supporting proof-of-concept code, screenshots, or logs.

We take all security issues seriously and will respond to your report promptly. We appreciate your efforts to responsibly disclose any vulnerabilities you discover and to work with us to address them.

## Security Vulnerability Response

Once we receive your security vulnerability report, our security team will assess it and investigate the issue. We will strive to provide regular updates on the progress and resolution of the issue.

During the investigation and resolution process, we may request additional information or clarifications from you. We appreciate your cooperation and assistance in helping us address the vulnerability effectively.

Please note that as an open-source project, our resources may be limited. We kindly ask for your patience and understanding throughout the process.

## Security Updates and Notifications

As part of our commitment to security, we will provide security updates and notifications for vulnerabilities that are discovered and fixed in this project. We encourage all users to stay updated with the latest releases and apply security patches promptly.

You can subscribe to receive notifications for security advisories by watching this repository or following our official communication channels.

## Acknowledgments

We would like to express our gratitude to the individuals and researchers who have responsibly reported security vulnerabilities to us. Your efforts help improve the security of this project and protect our users. If you would like, we are happy to acknowledge your contributions publicly (unless you request to remain anonymous).

Thank you for your support in making this project more secure.
